positives: No policy cancellations across all 5 years (2020–2024)
Two claim-free years (2021 and 2023) out of five
Consistent long-term insurability with recognized national carriers
Overall premium trend declining from $470,199.50 (2021) to $414,601.77 (2024), suggesting favorable underwriting adjustments
concerns: Claims reported in 3 of 5 years (2020, 2022, 2024) — 60% claim frequency rate
Loss ratios not provided; severity of claims cannot be assessed
Carrier turnover every year across 5 different insurers may indicate market difficulty or shopping behavior
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Over the 5-year period 2020–2024, the insured reported a total of 3 claims (in policy years 2020, 2022, and 2024) and 2 claim-free years (2021 and 2023). No cancellations were recorded. Loss ratios were not provided in the data. Annual premiums ranged from $414,601.77 to $470,199.50, with a general downward trend from 2021 onward. The insured was placed with five different carriers over this period.

extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Claims reported in policy years 2020 (Berkshire Hathaway Guard, policy 7CP0004214), 2022 (American International Group, policy CP006315-001), and 2024 (CNA Financial, policy CP-5690-6189). One claim per year in each of those years. No claims in 2021 or 2023. No loss ratios or claim amounts provided.
